steps.title: Read the vertex
steps.content: The object reaches a maximum height of $277$ feet at $t=3$. That means the vertex has time coordinate $3$ and height coordinate $277$, and the parabola opens downward.

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content: Substitute $a=-16$ into vertex form. $$f(t)=-16(t-3)^2+277$$ The answer is D.
